system.description: The character is trained in combat Healing and capable of bringing wounded comrades back to fighting condition. As an action in combat, the combat healer may throw Healing/INT 8+ to immediately revive an unconscious character with Wounds. The revived character will still be wounded and prone. However, they will be able to act in the following combat round.
system.shortdescr: Healing/INT 8+ to revive unconscious character in combat.
